name: sif-page
description: A robust, TypeScript-based booking and scheduling management system. This project features advanced conflict detection, automated revocation handling, and a strictly typed validation architecture.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm --prefix frontend run build
